entities.name: SOIL CARBOHYDRATES
entities.description: Chemical components of soil that make up 5-25% of soil organic matter and serve as indicators of substrate quality and SOM dynamics

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: The organic fraction of soil, which includes carbohydrates

entities.name: SUBSTRATE QUALITY
entities.description: The quality of the soil substrate, indicated by the levels of soil carbohydrates

entities.name: SOM DYNAMICS
entities.description: The processes governing the turnover and stability of soil organic matter

entities.name: ACID HYDROLYSIS
entities.description: A method used for the extraction and assessment of soil carbohydrates

entities.name: CHROMATOGRAPHY
entities.description: An analytical method used to quantify soil carbohydrates

entities.name: HUMIC ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: The association of carbohydrates with humic substances that hinders their extraction

entities.name: LABILE CARBON FRACTIONS
entities.description: The readily available and decomposable portions of soil carbon

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The capacity of soil to function as a vital living ecosystem

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of the soil system to maintain productivity and function over time
